title: Help Desk - Overview of DoIT Service Eligibility and Deactivations
body: You can view your role and eligibility for certain services by going to UW-Madison Profile . For more information, please review the UW-Madison DoIT Services catalog . Adobe Creative Cloud Eligibility for Adobe Creative Cloud Licensed By University of Wisconsin System's ETLA Box Leaving the University of Wisconsin-Madison - Access to IT Services UW Madison Enterprise Box Service Terms of Use Campus Software Library Software Available to Faculty/Staff and Students on Campus Software Library Cisco VoIP/Webex Cisco VoIP Request Forms Doodle UW-Madison Doodle - Create and log in to your UW-Madison Doodle Account GitLab DoIT Shared Tools - GitLab - Service Eligibility Google Workspace Leaving the University of Wisconsin-Madison - Access to IT Services UW-Madison Google Workspace - Former student eligibility policy and timeline UW-Madison Google Workspace - Eligibility Learn@UW Scope (services covered): Atomic Assessments Canvas Engage Givepulse Honorlock Kaltura Namecoach Turnitin Deactivation timeline for all Learn@UW tools can be seen here: Learn@UW Madison - Deactivation Timeline for Learn@UW Tools [UW-Madison] .
